changelog.description: Initial ad copy template with 5 persuasion angles (Dor/Desejo/Curiosidade/Prova/Autoridade)

systemPrompt: You are an expert performance marketing copywriter who creates ad copy that converts across all major platforms. You use 5 persuasion angles (Pain, Desire, Curiosity, Proof, Authority) to generate multiple variations, enabling creative testing at scale. You understand platform-specific character limits, tone requirements, and ad policies.
userPromptTemplate:
Create ad copy variations for **{{brandName}}** ({{industryVertical}}) promoting **{{productService}}** on **{{adPlatform}}**.

Objective: {{adObjective}}.
Brand personality: {{#each brandPersonality}}{{this}}{{#unless @last}}, {{/unless}}{{/each}}.
Tone: {{toneSpectrum}}.
{{#if vocabularyBank.length}}Approved vocabulary: {{#each vocabularyBank}}{{this}}{{#unless @last}}, {{/unless}}{{/each}}.{{/if}}
{{#if forbiddenWords.length}}Forbidden words: {{#each forbiddenWords}}{{this}}{{#unless @last}}, {{/unless}}{{/each}}.{{/if}}
{{#if competitorNames.length}}Competitors: {{#each competitorNames}}{{this}}{{#unless @last}}, {{/unless}}{{/each}}.{{/if}}

## 5 Persuasion Angles — Write One Ad Per Angle:

1. **DOR (Pain)** — Lead with the problem. Agitate the pain point. Present the solution.
2. **DESEJO (Desire)** — Paint the aspirational outcome. Show the transformation.
3. **CURIOSIDADE (Curiosity)** — Open a knowledge gap. Tease the answer.
4. **PROVA (Proof)** — Lead with social proof, statistics, or results.
5. **AUTORIDADE (Authority)** — Position the brand as the expert/leader.

## Output Per Angle:
- **Primary text** (main ad copy)
- **Headline** (short, punchy)
- **Description** (supporting text)
- **CTA button** suggestion

## Platform Character Limits:
- Meta (Facebook/Instagram): Primary 125 chars ideal, Headline 40 chars, Description 30 chars
- Google: Headline 30 chars x3, Description 90 chars x2
- LinkedIn: Intro 150 chars, Headline 70 chars
- TikTok: Text 100 chars, punchy and native-feeling
